properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hallelujah for the blood that redeems us, Hallelujah! I Will sing it on and on, Hallelujah for the blood of that precious Son of God, Hallelujah for ever more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is Lord He is Lord! He Is risen from the dead And He is Lord! Every knee shall bow, Every tongue confess, That Jesus Christ He’s Lord!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Haleluia kwa damu ya Mwokozi, Haleluial Imbeni daima, Haleluia kwa damu ya Mwana wake Mungu, Haleluia kwake Bwana. .

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yu Bwana! Yu Bwana! Amefufuka kifoni Yu Bwana, Na kila ulimi hukiri kwamba Yesu ndiye Bwana.
